title: Thermal Flask 1.2L, Stainless Steel Water Bottle with Handle, Leakproof Vacuum Insulated Flasks, Portable Insulated Bottle Travel Flask for Hot and Cold Drinks(Black)
features: 【Keep Drinks Hot & Cold】The inside of the stainless steel flask adopts double wall vacuum insulated design, which has good heat preservation effect and good airtightness to prevent water leakage. Keeps all your drinks hot/cold for a several hours or more. Large capacity of 1L/34oz and the wide mouth of the bottle makes it easy to place ice cubes or pour hot water.

【BPA Free Stainless Steel】The hot drink flask is made of high-quality 316 stainless steel and food grade PP, it's sturdy and durable, safe and environmentally friendly, BPA-free. The lid is designed for a cup to easy drinking, allowing you to easily replenish moisture anytime, anywhere. Fill the 1.2 L insulated flask with water, coffee, tea or other drinks, whether you're at home, work or outdoors.

【Leak-Proof & Non-Slip】Designed with a "one click closure" leak-resistant lid, so you can put the flask in your backpack without worrying about any spills. When you press it to open, you can easily pour water, and the lid will be locked very firmly when you close it. So do not need to worry about knocking over the bottle any more. Moreover, the bottom of the vacuum flasks is equipped with a non-slip silicone base.

【Portable Handle & Shoulder Strap】Designed with the side carry handle and shoulder strap, various carrying methods, backpack carrying/shoulder carrying/ hand-carry, you can easily carry the water flask whenever you are camping, climbing or hiking outdoors on the road. Meeting your needs of drinks anytime and anywhere, and making your journey more comfortable.

【Ideal Gift】It is a good choice to express your care for friends and family with beautiful and practical gifts. Perfect gift birthdays, weddings, Christmas, anniversaries, or other celebrations. Our large thermal flask is very suitable for daily use and can be taken with you. Such as hiking, Biking, Beach, Camping, Travel, School or company.
